title: tilia americana var. caroliniana
intro: Tilia americana var. caroliniana, also known as the American Linden or Carolina Basswood, is a deciduous tree native to the southeastern United States. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tilia americana var. caroliniana include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and act as a natural expectorant to relieve coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and soothe respiratory issues.
